```python
def rotate_matrix(m):
    n = len(m)
    for layer in range(n // 2):
        first = layer
        last = n - 1 - layer
        for i in range(first, last):
            offset = i - first
            top = m[first][i]
            m[first][i] = m[last - offset][first]
            m[last - offset][first] = m[last][last - offset]
            m[last][last - offset] = m[i][last]
            m[i][last] = top
```
